title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLIV. Relics.
content:
A good child, a good child,
            As I suppose you be,
        Never laughed nor smiled
            At the tickling of your knee.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCLIV. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
